info.name: PlutusPM CRE SaaS - Full Backend
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for PlutusPM Commercial Real Estate SaaS Supabase backend. Covers Auth, GraphQL (pg_graphql), REST (PostgREST), Storage, Edge Functions, Realtime, Scheduler. Portfolio -> Sites -> Everything on Site architecture.

Setup:
1. Import this collection + environment file
2. Set supabaseUrl and anonKey in environment
3. Run Auth > Sign In to get user JWT (auto-saved as userJwt)
4. All other requests use userJwt

Documentation: /docs/graphql-examples.md, /docs/FRONTEND_GUIDE_FOR_DEV.md

body.raw: {"query": "query { portfolioSitesCollection(first: 1) { edges { node { id name } } } }"}
